title: Minimum Moves to Equal Array Elements
titleCn: 最小操作次数使数组元素相等

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3] Output: 3 Explanation: Only three moves are needed (remember each move increments two elements): [1,2,3] => [2,3,3] => [3,4,3] => [4,4,4]
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: Only three moves are needed (remember each move increments two elements): [1,2,3] => [2,3,3] => [3,4,3] => [4,4,4]
